publishedAbstract: - While creating a `StorageSystem` after installing the OpenShift Data Foundation and Local Storage Operator, the wizard fails with the following error: ~~~ Minimum Node Requirement A minimum of 3 nodes are required for the initial deployment. Only 0 node match to the selected filters. Please adjust the filters to include more nodes. ~~~ Although the cluster has three dedicated storage nodes with raw disks attached, ODF does not detect them as eligible for use.
publishedTitle: OpenShift Data Foundation StorageSystem creation fails with error “Minimum Node Requirement – Only 0 node match to the selected filters”
